title: Trump turns 80: UFC cage fight, Iran deal, fighter jet flyover mark his birthday - watch
description: President Donald Trump celebrated his 80th birthday with a UFC fight card on the White House South Lawn. The event, "UFC Freedom 250", also marked the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence. Thousands gathered to watch cage fights. The White House grounds were transformed into an outdoor arena for the spectacle. This unusual sporting event occurred shortly after an agreement was announced to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The elaborate setup involved significant investment and labor.

title: Why one former Meta employee believes AI is reshaping careers faster than expected
description: When 24-year-old former Meta data scientist Moyan Chen was laid off, she saw it as more than a job loss—it was a wake-up call about AI’s growing impact on careers. In an interview with Business Insider, Chen reflected on how automation is reshaping traditional tech roles, why she no longer sees corporate jobs as secure, and why future professionals must develop broader, adaptable skill sets. Her journey highlights the changing realities of work in the AI era.

title: To remove residual colonial dress customs, Army brings in Bandis, battle jackets
description: The Army has also introduced a new winter working dress featuring a Battle Jacket, which will gradually replace the existing jersey-based winter uniform (Dress 3A) by June 2029. The Battle Jacket has been reintroduced as standard winter outerwear for all ranks, with a three-year transition period for implementation. Among the changes is the introduction of a closed-neck coat, commonly known as a Bandi jacket, to be worn over a full-sleeved shirt with matching formal trousers and closed footwear.

Behind every intelligent machine, highly specialised human expertise is required,” Viswanath P S, MD & CEO, Randstad India, said. Terming it as a pronounced “labour flip”, he said skilled, technical trades are outpacing traditional, entry-level professional roles.

Commerce minister Piyush Goyal and principal scientific adviser Ajay Kumar Sood were in the room. “India has emerged not as a consumer of solutions but as a contributor to solutions in the world.

title: Rescued 14 Indians from sinking dhow that suffered engine snag, says US
description: S Naval Forces Central Command/US 5th Fleet reposted a news report about the rescue operation that said “upon receiving a distress call from the stranded sailors, a US Navy P-8 aircraft reached the spot and dropped a search-and-rescue kit that included a life raft, which the 14 mariners boarded”. Official sources said that the US Navy had alerted the shore authorities and Indian Navy that a dhow with Indian sailors was sinking about 80 nautical miles east of Ras AI Hadd off the coast of Oman.

title: TMC rebels, with one MP above 2/3rd mark, eye merger with little-known regional party
description: In a dramatic development, 20 rebel Trinamool Congress MPs informed Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla that their group has merged with NCPI — which is registered in West Bengal’s Howrah and had contested a few seats in the 2023 Tripura assembly elections — and that they will be backing the BJP-led NDA. Incidentally, “to save your rights, reject political turncoats” was one of the slogans of NCPI.

title: 2x trade in 5 years, nuclear cooperation: Modi-Macron Nice meet
description: Adoption of an innovation roadmap to deepen cooperation in critical and emerging technology, launch of an economic security dialogue, another working group for AI governance and a declaration to double bilateral trade in the next five years were among the 13 outcomes announced after the meeting. Both sides also looked to ramp up defence cooperation, consistent with India’s Make in India initiative.

Hidden cost of AI? Researchers warn of a slow erosion of human thinking
description: The researchers argue that as people increasingly rely on AI systems to write, analyse information and make decisions, they may become less capable of performing those tasks independently. More worryingly, they suggest that the effects may become apparent only after significant damage has already occurred. “The longer they go unaddressed, the less capacity remains to address them,” the paper warns.

description: An Hoshiarpur jail inmate, accused in multiple cases, livestreamed videos from prison alleging drug supply, even displaying what he claimed was methamphetamine. He accused officials of complicity and challenged authorities to reveal names. The incident has sparked outrage, with opposition parties questioning the government's law and order claims and anti-drug campaign.

title: 12 killed after skydiving plane crashes near Missouri airport in US
description: According to Highway Patrol Sergeant Justin Ewing, the aircraft was transporting skydivers when it went down. Emergency services received reports at around 11.30am local time that a plane had crashed and caught fire. Firefighters quickly brought the blaze under control, but Ewing described the scene as "brutal". The aircraft came down in a field next to the airport, prompting authorities to close nearby roads as a precaution.

Johnny Placide questions VAR after Haiti penalty appeals rejected
description: Haiti captain Johnny Placide criticized VAR after two second-half handball appeals involving Scotland defender Grant Hanley were not reviewed during Scotland’s 1-0 Group C win in Boston. Jean-Ricner Bellegarde also questioned the decisions. Placide said Haiti respected Scotland’s victory but wanted transparency and clear explanations from match officials regarding the two controversial incidents.

title: Jude Bellingham caught up in Ashlyn Castro family drama
description: Ashlyn Castro, the girlfriend of England and Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham, is facing a public family dispute after her mother, Tina Marie Young, claimed she is living in a homeless shelter in Los Angeles. Young accused Castro of abandoning her and making false statements about her mental health. Castro has previously denied those allegations and defended her position publicly.

To Mars with Musk: Can world's first trillionaire take you to the little red planet?
description: Elon Musk's ambitious plan to establish a permanent human settlement on Mars faces monumental challenges. SpaceX's Starship is designed for this, but orbital refuelling and survival on the harsh red planet are critical hurdles. Despite setbacks, testing progresses, with uncrewed cargo missions eyed for 2028, followed by potential human landings.

title: How a woman who was mocked for her short height by almost everybody found love
description: Aashna Kushwaha endured relentless bullying and mockery due to her short stature throughout her childhood and adolescence. Despite facing humiliation, rejection, and even being disowned by her parents, she found strength and self-acceptance. Her journey highlights the resilience of the human spirit in overcoming societal judgment and defining one's own worth.

Somvati Amavasya on June 15: Date, timings, puja rituals and significance
description: Somvati Amavasya, a significant day for honoring ancestors and spiritual cleansing, falls on June 15, 2026. This powerful New Moon, occurring on a Monday, is observed with rituals like Pitru Tarpan, feeding cows and crows, and worshipping Lord Shiva. Devotees also engage in charity and offer water to the Peepal tree for spiritual merit and prosperity.
